answers: Filmmaking basics: script → pre-production (planning) → production (shooting) → post-production (editing, sound, color).
Start: make short films with your phone. Story matters more than equipment. Learn basic composition and lighting.
Tips: always prioritize good audio (bad audio ruins films), plan your shots, and edit ruthlessly — shorter is usually better.
Cinema banano: story prothome likho, phone diye shoot koro, good audio ensure koro, ar DaVinci Resolve e edit koro.
